name: Raidraptor - Heel Eagle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レイド・ラプターズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ヒール・イーグル
desc: If all monsters you control are "Raidraptor" monsters (min. 1): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Raidraptor" Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Raidraptor - Heel Eagle" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If all monsters you control are "Raidraptor" monsters (min. 1): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Raidraptor" Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Raidraptor - Heel Eagle" once per turn.
eff: If all monsters you control are "Raidraptor" monsters (min. 1): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Raidraptor" Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Raidraptor - Heel Eagle" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
